posts.author: Gluten4905 (leo)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking to sell my app that is currently published in the market.
For more details, please write me at devauthor@grinflai.cfd

The app has almost 200 installations and was launched this year.
It has been on the market for about 5 months.
It does not rely on third-party server and is fully hosted on Monday.
The app is similar to notes and reminder tool.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Checking if we are cool with this Slack
